ses.vdmattributes.guardianattributes.Cfn: Settings for your VDM configuration as applicable to the Guardian.

ses.vdmattributes.guardianattributes.Opt.Description: Specifies the status of your VDM optimized shared delivery. Can be one of the following:  + `ENABLED` – Amazon SES enables optimized shared delivery for your account.+ `DISABLED` – Amazon SES disables optimized shared delivery for your account.
